description: Designed for the man of style, this pair of brown leather back strap sandals from lee cooper is set to pivot you into a world of royal living. Soft to touch, this pair has a suede footbed and back strap lining that makes it absolutely pamper your feet.Upper Pure leather upper covering entire midfoot length and attached to midsole with four overlays Stylish midfoot upper detailing in stitch and leather Velcro straps on midfoot and backfoot to lock the foot in place and provide a snug, comfortable Fit Suede leather outer lining for backstrap for added durability and style Padded fabric lining inside complete inner for breathability and comfort Midsole Padded suede leather footbed with leather heel cup for enhanced, comfort, breathability and style Synthetic leather midsole for enhanced durability Embossed brand logo on heel part of footbed Outsole PU outsole for extra comfort and durability Cross horizontal grooves and textured outsole for enhanced grip, traction and durability CareClean surface using an oil pull polish and leather brushUse a leather and suede spray to restore shine with an all season shine spongeDo not machine wash
